channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: FontViewer - Fri May 01 16:37:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
Preview font files (TTF, OTF, WOFF, WOFF2) directly inside the IDE. Custom text preview at multiple sizes with live glyph set Browse the Private Use Area...
vendor: Jakey CHAI downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: cn.itscloudy.fontviewer

item.title: AILoc2 Probe - Mon May 04 11:29:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
Local-first AI attribution for IntelliJ IDEA commits. AILoc2 observes editor edits, estimates staged AI-assisted change percentage without prompt or instruction...
vendor: Gogolian downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.ailoc2.probe

item.title: GitHub Actions Monitor - Fri May 01 08:07:04 UTC 2026
item.description:
Monitor and act on GitHub Actions for your project's repo without leaving the IDE. Authenticate via PAT or your IDE-configured GitHub account. Supports github.com and...
vendor: Marcelo Trevisani downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: gh_actions_monitor.marcelotrevisani

item.title: Minestom Project Wizard - Sat May 02 09:23:55 UTC 2026
item.description:
Creates Gradle based Minestom server projects from the New Project wizard. Disclaimer: This plugin is not official and is not affiliated with Minestom in any way.
vendor: Flowstom downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: net.flowstom.jetbrains_plugin

item.title: MetaScript - Sun May 03 22:32:32 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for MetaScript — TypeScript-style syntax with compile-time macros, match expressions, Result<T,E> types, and multiple backends (C, JavaScript...
vendor: Le Cloud downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.metascript

item.title: AI File Opener - Mon May 04 12:44:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Automatically opens files in the editor as an AI coding agent works on them. When an external AI tool (Claude Code, Aider, or any other agent) edits or creates a...
vendor: Nathan Hayfield downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.nhayfield.claude-file-opener

item.title: AI Engineering Fluency - Sun May 03 13:35:23 UTC 2026
item.description:
Visualises your GitHub Copilot token usage and AI engineering fluency directly inside any JetBrains IDE. Uses the same analytics and visualisations as the VS Code...
vendor: Rob Bos downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.rajbos.ai-engineering-fluency

item.title: Whisper Speech to Text - Thu Apr 30 21:50:12 UTC 2026
item.description:
Voice-to-text dictation for JetBrains IDEs using OpenAI Whisper. Speak instead of type, anywhere a caret is focused. Features Three transcription backends: local...
vendor: Abdelghani Roussi downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.aroussi.whisper

item.title: WoW Lua Language Server - Mon May 04 15:26:21 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: TradeSkillMaster downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.tradeskillmaster.wowlua-ls

item.title: Editor Peer Bridge - Fri May 01 04:52:09 UTC 2026
item.description:
Cross-editor code navigation tool. Jump between Rider, VSCode, Cursor, and CodeBuddy with a single keystroke.
vendor: shichao402 downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.editorpeerbridge.bridge

item.title: Android Build Booster - Mon May 04 11:59:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
Android Build Booster helps you find and fix Android build bottlenecks directly inside IntelliJ IDEA. Health Analyzer: Detects missing gradle.properties optimizations...
vendor: Shubham Singh downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.shubham0707.androidbuildbooster

item.title: Gbase 8s JDBC Driver - Mon May 04 17:57:11 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Vasilii Chernov downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.tjlee.gbasejdbcdriver

item.title: Docker Manager - Mon May 04 11:47:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Stop switching to the terminal for docker ps, docker logs, docker stop. Run your daily Docker workflow without leaving your editor. What you can do See everything...
vendor: meanmail.dev downloads: 0 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.meanmail.plugin.docker

vendor: PickAID Modding Template downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: cn.mihono.pickaid.template.assistant

item.description:

item.title: latex.granaria - Thu Apr 30 17:08:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
latex.granaria compiles the current .tex file with a local Tectonic executable from inside PyCharm and other IntelliJ-based IDEs. The plugin runs entirely locally. It...
